mapper.select: SELECT id AS id, knowledge_id AS knowledgeId, model_name AS modelName, dimension AS dimension, content_hash AS contentHash, embedding_vector AS embeddingVector, gmt_create AS gmtCreate, gmt_modified AS gmtModified FROM knowledge_chunk_embedding WHERE knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId} AND model_name = #{modelName}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_chunk_embedding ( id, knowledge_id, model_name, dimension, content_hash, embedding_vector, gmt_create, gmt_modified ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{knowledgeId}, #{modelName}, #{dimension}, #{contentHash}, #{embeddingVector}, #{gmtCreate}, #{gmtModified} )
